name: LinkedIn Nurture — HeyReach → Claude → Route → Send

nodes.name: HeyReach Webhook
nodes.notes: HeyReach fires this on MESSAGE_REPLY_RECEIVED. Set this URL in HeyReach → Settings → Webhooks

nodes.name: Acknowledge (200 OK)
nodes.notes: Respond immediately so HeyReach doesn't timeout

nodes.name: Get Full Thread from HeyReach
nodes.notes: Fetches the complete conversation thread for better Claude context. Credential: HeyReach API Key header X-API-KEY

nodes.name: Claude: Classify & Route
nodes.notes: Calls Claude API to classify lead stage and choose routing outcome

nodes.name: Call Backend: Draft & Queue
nodes.notes: Sends the routing decision to the Node.js backend which drafts the message and queues it for review

parameters.name: text

nodes.name: Slack: Human Takeover Alert
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_SLACK_WEBHOOK with your Slack incoming webhook URL. Or use email/any notification.
